Name: MENU_PARAM_ST
Description: Stay Param. Handles various elements relating to the player HUD.

Fields.Name: Solo Play Death Fade-Out Delay
Fields.Description: Time, in seconds, after the "YOU DIED" message is displayed before the screen begins to fade out in single-player.

Fields.Name: White/Black Phantom Death Fade-Out Delay
Fields.Description: Time, in seconds, after the "YOU DIED" message is displayed before the screen begins to fade out while playing as a White or Black Phantom.

Fields.Name: Maximum Player HP Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum HP value used when calculating what percentage of the prepared HP gauge graphic should be displayed.

Fields.Name: Maximum Player FP Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum FP value used when calculating what percentage of the prepared FP gauge graphic should be displayed.

Fields.Name: Maximum Player Stamina Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum stamina value used when calculating what percentage of the prepared stamina gauge graphic should be displayed.

Fields.Name: Action Panel Switch Speed Threshold
Fields.Description: Maximum player movement speed, in meters per second, at which the action panel can be switched.

Fields.Name: Action Panel Switch Speed Averaging Time
Fields.Description: Time period, in seconds, used to calculate the player's average movement speed for determining whether the action panel can be switched. Maximum of 4 seconds.

Fields.Name: Additional HP for Gauge Length Calculation
Fields.Description: Value added to the player's maximum HP when calculating the displayed HP gauge length.

Fields.Name: Additional FP for Gauge Length Calculation
Fields.Description: Value added to the player's maximum FP when calculating the displayed FP gauge length.

Fields.Name: Additional Stamina for Gauge Length Calculation
Fields.Description: Value added to the player's maximum stamina when calculating the displayed stamina gauge length.

Fields.Name: Decal Horizontal Offset
Fields.Description: Horizontal offset applied to decal display positions.

Fields.Name: Decal Vertical Offset
Fields.Description: Vertical offset applied to decal display positions.

Fields.Name: Wire Point Minimum Size
Fields.Description: Minimum size multiplier used when scaling wire points based on distance. Relative to the size specified in the Flash UI.

Fields.Name: Wire Point Maximum Size
Fields.Description: Maximum size multiplier used when scaling wire points based on distance. Relative to the size specified in the Flash UI.

Fields.Name: Health Status - Uninjured Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum HP ratio required for the 'Uninjured' health status icon to be displayed.

Fields.Name: Health Status - Lightly Wounded Threshold
Fields.Description: Displayed when HP is below the Uninjured threshold but at or above this threshold.

Fields.Name: Health Status - Heavily Wounded Threshold
Fields.Description: Displayed when HP is below the Lightly Wounded threshold but at or above this threshold.

Fields.Name: Health Status - Critical Threshold
Fields.Description: Displayed when HP is below the Heavily Wounded threshold but at or above this threshold.

Fields.Name: Health Status - Dead Threshold
Fields.Description: Displayed when HP is below the Critical threshold but at or above this threshold.

Fields.Name: Extra Life Icon Soul Threshold
Fields.Description: If the player's Soul count is at or above this value, the 'extra life available' icon is displayed.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - White Threshold
Fields.Description: Displays the white lock-on cursor when the enemy's remaining posture ratio is at or above this value.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - Light Yellow Threshold
Fields.Description: Displays the light yellow lock-on cursor when the enemy's remaining posture ratio is at or above this value.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - Yellow Threshold
Fields.Description: Displays the yellow lock-on cursor when the enemy's remaining posture ratio is at or above this value.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - Orange Threshold
Fields.Description: Displays the orange lock-on cursor when the enemy's remaining posture ratio is at or above this value.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - Red Threshold
Fields.Description: Displays the red lock-on cursor when the enemy's remaining posture ratio is at or above this value.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Wire Point Visible Range X
Fields.Description: Horizontal screen percentage beyond the screen boundary where a normal wire point is still displayed.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Wire Point Visible Range Y
Fields.Description: Vertical screen percentage beyond the screen boundary where a normal wire point is still displayed.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Wire Point Screen Edge Offset X
Fields.Description: Horizontal percentage from the screen edge where off-screen wire point indicators are displayed.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Wire Point Screen Edge Offset Y
Fields.Description: Vertical percentage from the screen edge where off-screen wire point indicators are displayed.

Fields.Name: Enable Off-Screen Wire Point Distance Scaling
Fields.Description: Determines whether off-screen wire point indicators scale based on distance.

Fields.Name: Off-Screen Wire Point Fixed Size
Fields.Description: Fixed display size used for off-screen wire point indicators when distance scaling is disabled.

Fields.Name: Enemy Posture Indicator - Dark Red Threshold
Fields.Description: Threshold for displaying the dark red lock-on cursor based on the enemy's remaining posture.

Fields.Name: Opening Movie Delay
Fields.Description: Time, in seconds, to wait before playing the opening movie.

Fields.Name: Low Stamina Gauge Threshold
Fields.Description: If the player's stamina falls below this value, the stamina gauge changes color.

Fields.Name: Detection Marker Point Ratio
Fields.Description: Percentage of points used for displaying the detection warning marker. Unused.

Fields.Name: Test Off-Screen Wire Point Visible Range X
Fields.Description: Test layout parameter used by GameProperties for the horizontal off-screen wire point visible range.

Fields.Name: Test Off-Screen Wire Point Visible Range Y
Fields.Description: Test layout parameter used by GameProperties for the vertical off-screen wire point visible range.

Fields.Name: Test Off-Screen Wire Point Screen Edge Offset X
Fields.Description: Test layout parameter used by GameProperties for the horizontal off-screen wire point display offset.

Fields.Name: Test Off-Screen Wire Point Screen Edge Offset Y
Fields.Description: Test layout parameter used by GameProperties for the vertical off-screen wire point display offset.

Fields.Name: Quarter Heart HP Value
Fields.Description: Amount of HP represented by one quarter of a heart icon.

Fields.Name: Detection Marker Off-Screen Range X
Fields.Description: Horizontal visible range for off-screen detection warning markers.

Fields.Name: Detection Marker Off-Screen Range Y
Fields.Description: Vertical visible range for off-screen detection warning markers.

Fields.Name: Detection Marker Screen Edge Offset X
Fields.Description: Horizontal distance from the screen edge at which off-screen detection warning markers are displayed.

Fields.Name: Detection Marker Screen Edge Offset Y
Fields.Description: Vertical distance from the screen edge at which off-screen detection warning markers are displayed.

Fields.Name: Item Pickup Log Display Time
Fields.Description: Time, in seconds, that each item pickup log entry remains visible.

Fields.Name: Minimum Posture Gauge Display Time
Fields.Description: Minimum amount of time, in seconds, that the posture gauge remains visible.

Fields.Description: Reserved. Purpose unknown.
